items.title: Why We Removed Ads from Our Free Tools (And Put Them Only on Blog Posts)
items.summary:
This article was originally published on Jo4 Blog.


We built a suite of free developer tools: JSON formatter, JWT decoder, QR generator, UTM builder, and about a dozen others.

Then we added AdSense to every page.

Then we removed it from most of them.

Here's why.

items.title: Why We Built Dhara — An Open Protocol Standard for AI Agents, Not Another Product

items.title: I Built a Skin System for Claude Code — Here's How It Works
items.summary:
Claude Code is genuinely remarkable. But if you've been using it for more than a week, you've noticed something: everyone's terminal looks identical. Same colors, same layout, same feel. You could screenshot my session or yours and there'd be no way to tell them apart.

items.title: Visualize Infracost on Your Architecture Diagram
items.summary:
Infracost estimates your monthly cloud bill from Terraform code before you deploy. But its output — a long table of resource costs in the terminal — makes it hard to see which part of your architecture is driving spend. Is it the database? The NAT gateway? The EC2 fleet?

items.title: GitHub Action: Auto-Post Architecture Diagrams on IaC PRs

items.title: Visualize Checkov Results on Your Architecture Diagram
items.summary:

items.summary: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

items.title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
items.summary: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that it is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

items.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
items.summary: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."

items.title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
items.summary: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

items.title: NYT’s Wordle to become a TV game show
items.summary: This will be the first time that The Times has collaborated with a TV broadcaster for an entertainment-based program, representing yet another pivot in the media company's attempt to build a sustainable digital subscription business as print revenue continues to decline.
